title: Create FaceDetectorService using @mediapipe/tasks-vision with oval guide and face validity logic
acceptance_criteria: initialize(): lazy-init the detector only once (idempotent)
predictWebcam(videoEl, canvasEl, timestamp): crops video to square (centred crop) before detection
predictWebcam draws oval guide on canvas overlay: red stroke when face invalid, green stroke when face valid
predictWebcam returns base64 JPEG string if face is valid, null otherwise
Face validity: exactly 1 face detected, bbox width AND height both between 170–250px, face centre within 11% of smaller video dimension from frame centre with 20% upward Y offset
Uses inject() function pattern, not constructor injection
completion_summary: Created FaceDetectorService with lazy-init, predictWebcam square crop+detection+oval overlay, spec-compliant face validity, dispose
